name: Hungarian Stuffed Cabbage Leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the cabbage and place it in boiling water.
2. As the leaves become wilted, peel them off and place on paper towels to dry.
3. Trim out the center vein of each leaf.
4. Sauté onion and garlic in butter until softened.
5. Add meat, rice, seasonings, and stir together.
6. Simmer for 20 minutes.
7. Place a tablespoon of this filling on each cabbage leaf and roll up the leaf.
8. Layer the filled cabbage leaves in a pot.
9. Cover with water (2/3 of the way).
10. Stir together tomato paste, sour cream, and sauerkraut.
11. Spoon over top.
12. Cover and cook on simmer for 1 hour, or until rice is tender.
13. Serves 6.
